title: Smartworks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Smartworks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!
